body:
### **MIL GRACIAS, WARD 1.**

### **I PLEDGE TO CONTINUE FIGHTING FOR OUR COMMUNITY.**

Last night did not end the way we had hoped, but I want one thing to be absolutely clear: I am incredibly proud of what we built together.

To my volunteers: thank you for giving your time, your energy, and your heart. It means more to me than I can ever express.

To my campaign team: you worked tirelessly and never gave up. I will never forget everything you did and the sacrifices you made along the way.

To every person who voted for me: thank you. You believed in this vision, and that belief does not end tonight.

To the apparent winner of this race, I wish her the very best. Ward 1 deserves strong leadership, and I hope she will fight for every family, every neighbor, and every member of our community.

As for me, I'm not going anywhere. I am a product of Ward 1. I am part of this community.

People who look like me, who grew up like me, and who face the same challenges that so many people across this city face deserve to be seen, heard, and represented. And that is exactly what I will continue to fight for.

Washington, DC is worth fighting for. Our neighborhoods are worth fighting for. Our families are worth fighting for.

This is not the end. It is only the beginning.

Mil Gracias, Ward 1.

I love you all very much.

The fight continues.

\- Jackie Reyes-Yanes
summary_en:
Last night did not end the way we had hoped, but I want one thing to be absolutely clear: I am incredibly proud of what we built together.

To my volunteers: thank you for giving your time, your energy, and your heart. It means more to me than I can ever express.

To my campaign team: you worked tirelessly and never gave up. I will never forget everything you did and the sacrifices you made along the way.
summary_es:
Anoche no terminó como esperábamos, pero quiero que algo quede muy claro: estoy profundamente orgullosa de cada uno de nosotros.

A mis voluntarios: gracias por comparator su tiempo, su energía y su corazón. Eso significa más de lo que puedo expresar.

A mi equipo de campaña: trabajaron incansablemente y nunca se rindieron. Jamás olvidaré todo lo que hicieron.
title_en: Statement from Jackie Reyes-Yanes Following the Ward 1 Democratic Primary
title_es: Declaración de Jackie Reyes-Yanes Tras la Primaria Demócrata del Ward 1
